samples.text: All squares are rectangles. A non-square rectangle is a rectangle. Is a non-square rectangle a square?
Every member of squares is among rectangles. A non-square rectangle is a rectangle. Does it follow that a non-square rectangle is a square?
All regular quadrilaterals are four-sided shapes. A non-square rectangle is a four-sided shape. Is a non-square rectangle a regular quadrilateral?
Being a rectangle does not by itself make something a square. A non-square rectangle is a rectangle. Is a non-square rectangle a square?
All squares are rectangles. A non-square rectangle is a rectangle. A blue car is parked outside. Is a non-square rectangle a square?
